_README: Type registry: MapObjectId.value -> display info + gray-box dimensions in Unreal units (cm), full extents [x, y, z]. Only types personally observed in fixtures/ may appear here (CLAUDE.md C4). null dimension = not yet measured; renderer falls back to magenta unknown-box sizing. Sources: grid math in docs/CALIBRATION.md; furniture dims from works[].workable_bounds.box_extent (half-extents doubled).

Wooden_foundation.name: Wooden Foundation
Wooden_foundation.sizeSource: footprint = derived grid pitch; thickness eyeballed, origin at top surface — refine later

Wooden_wall.name: Wooden Wall
Wooden_wall.sizeSource: width = grid pitch, height = derived vertical pitch (pillar-derived, wall assumed equal), thickness eyeballed; origin at bottom edge midpoint

Wooden_pillar.name: Wooden Pillar
Wooden_pillar.sizeSource: height = derived vertical pitch (measured from stacked pair); cross-section eyeballed

Wooden_roof.name: Wooden Roof
Wooden_roof.sizeSource: footprint assumed = grid pitch; thickness eyeballed

PalBoxV2.name: Palbox
PalBoxV2.sizeSource: not measured; its works entry lacks usable bounds in fixture

Workbench.name: Primitive Workbench
Workbench.sizeSource: works[].workable_bounds.box_extent (110,150,47.5) doubled — interaction volume, slightly padded

MedicalPalBed_02.name: Pal Bed (Medical 02)
MedicalPalBed_02.sizeSource: works[].workable_bounds.box_extent (180,180,50) doubled — interaction volume, likely padded

CommonDropItem3D.name: Dropped Item Bag
CommonDropItem3D.sizeSource: nominal marker size — not a buildable; preserve verbatim, render distinctly

DamagableRock0012.name: Rock (world object)
DamagableRock0012.sizeSource: not a buildable; preserve verbatim, render distinctly
